worldData.instructions:
No controls — watch.

A lantern-bearer wanders the dusk, freezing the drifting creatures into ice one by one, and now and then thawing one back to life. The music cools as more of the world goes still.

creation_brief.prompt: A character walks around and freezes/unfrezes creatures and objects. gorgeous well rendered realistic graphics with interactive musical score and sound effects

stepHooks.author: claude
stepHooks.description: autonomous freezer figure + creatures + reactive audio

visualTypes.name: still
